data.body: Re-planned R3 off current origin/main (advisory-first + dogfood-gated): dropped stale E2+E6 batch-eval gate + stale depends_on (d125/a880/7d91). Implemented decomp-shape as an advisory AGENT-tier CONTAINER criterion (facet container, like G3/G4) on the pass1_container fan-out: registry (CANONICAL_LLM+AGENT_TIER, not CODEBASE_GROUNDED), routing (advisory, scope container), pass1.CONTAINER_CRITERIA, rubric, regenerated criteria guide. Extended eval_solver container arm to run container criteria via pass1_container over a children: fixture (bounded, 1 live call/fixture). review-plan PASS (blocking:0); claimed. Running bounded sanity eval next (4 hand-authored fixtures: layer-cake + consumed-artifact positives, vertical-slice + ordered-producer/consumer negatives).
